title: Slack webhook verification failed
symptom: When Slack sends a verification request, n8n responds with 'challenge_failed'. This prevents the Slack integration from functioning properly.
root_cause: Slack requires a specific response format for webhook verification. If n8n does not respond with the correct JSON object containing the challenge parameter, Slack will fail the verification process, leading to integration issues.
fix_steps: Ensure the webhook URL is correctly configured in Slack settings.
Modify the n8n workflow to respond with the JSON object {"challenge": "<challenge_value>"} when receiving a url_verification request.
agent_instruction: Update the n8n workflow to correctly respond to Slack's url_verification requests.
